revision.message: Refine instructional copy and add implementation checklist

data.content:
Meme generation workflow

This revision snapshot demonstrates how the preview can show rendered HTML while preserving the raw source view.

Implementation checklist

  1. Select an input image that communicates context.
  2. Apply concise text overlays that match the intended audience.
  3. Run an accessibility pass for captions, alternative text, and heading hierarchy.
